zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Venables於1330年出生在英國英格蘭爾金德頓時，他的父親Hugh de Venables34歲，母親Katherine de Houghton22歲。他於大約1355年與Ellen de Huxleigh在英國英格蘭爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆結婚。他於1377年被列為high sheriff of cheshire。他去世於1382年4月18日在英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Venables于1330年出生在英国英格兰爾金德頓时，他的父亲Hugh de Venables34岁，母亲Katherine de Houghton22岁。他于大约1355年与Ellen de Huxleigh在英国英格兰爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆结婚。他于1377年被列为high sheriff of cheshire。他去世于1382年4月18日在英国爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Venables was born in 1330, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh de Venables, was 34 and his mother, Katherine de Houghton, was 22. He married Ellen de Huxleigh about 1355, in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. In 1377, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of cheshire. He died on 18 April 1382, in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.Kinderton cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Venables est né en 1330, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Houghton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Ellen de Huxleigh environ 1355, à Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. En 1377, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of cheshire. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1382, à Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.Kinderton cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Venables 1330 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Venables 34 und seine Mutter Katherine de Houghton 22. Er hat um 1355 in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen de Huxleigh geheiratet. 1377, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of cheshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. April 1382 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Venables è nato il nel 1330 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh de Venables, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Houghton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Ellen de Huxleigh circa 1355, nel Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Nel 1377, all'età di 47 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of cheshire. Morì il 18 aprile 1382, nel Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Venablesが1330年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは34歳，母Katherine de Houghtonは22歳であった。約1355年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトン クウム ハルメでEllen de Huxleighと結婚した。1377年，47歳の時，職業はhigh sheriff of cheshireと記録されている。彼は1382年4月18日にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトン クウム ハルメで52歳で死去した。

ko.Kinderton cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 쿠 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Venables(이)가 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Houghton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 쿠 훌에서 Ellen de Huxleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 1377년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 high sheriff of cheshire이었다. 그는 1382년 4월 18일 영국 체실르 킨더턴 쿠 훌에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Venables nasceu em 1330, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Houghton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen de Huxleigh aproximadamente 1355, em Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Em 1377, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of cheshire. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1382, em Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.Kinderton cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Venables родился в 1330 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Houghton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen de Huxleigh около 1355 г. в местности киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. В 1377 году, в возрасте 47 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff of cheshire. Он умер 18 апреля 1382 г. в местности киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Venables nació en 1330, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Katherine de Houghton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ellen de Huxleigh aproximadamente 1355, en Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. En 1377, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of cheshire. Murió el 18 de abril de 1382, en Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
